descriptionDa: Første JSON-baserede prototypelektion med de samme begynderfraser som den oprindelige app.

dialogues.objectiveDa: Lær enkle portugisiske fraser med dansk betydning.

phrases.speaker: A
phrases.grammarDa: Use bom dia before lunch.

phrases.speaker: A
phrases.grammarDa: Eu sou means I am.

phrases.speaker: A
phrases.grammarDa: Questions often keep the same word order as statements.

phrases.speaker: A
phrases.grammarDa: Chamo-me is a simple way to say my name is.

phrases.speaker: A
phrases.grammarDa: Fala is the informal command for speak.

phrases.speaker: A
phrases.grammarDa: Não goes before the verb to make a negative sentence.

phrases.speaker: A
phrases.grammarDa: Onde asks where.

phrases.speaker: A
phrases.textDa: Jeg vil gerne have en kaffe.
phrases.grammarDa: Quero means I want and is useful in cafés and shops.

phrases.speaker: A
phrases.grammarDa: A and o often mean the.

phrases.speaker: A
phrases.grammarDa: Portuguese uses have hunger instead of am hungry.

phrases.speaker: A
phrases.grammarDa: This also uses tenho, meaning I have.

phrases.speaker: A
phrases.grammarDa: Short polite phrases work well in restaurants.

phrases.speaker: A
phrases.grammarDa: Quanto asks how much.

phrases.speaker: A
phrases.grammarDa: Gosto de means I like.

phrases.speaker: A
phrases.grammarDa: Em means in or at.

phrases.speaker: A
phrases.grammarDa: Está describes temporary states like weather.

phrases.speaker: A
phrases.grammarDa: Vou plus verb makes a simple future.

phrases.speaker: A
phrases.grammarDa: Preciso de means I need.

phrases.speaker: A
phrases.grammarDa: Até means until and is used in goodbyes.

phrases.speaker: A
phrases.grammarDa: Obrigado is said by a male speaker; obrigada by a female speaker.

grammar.explanationDa: Denne prototypelektion samler korte, nyttige begyndersætninger.

quiz.questionDa: Hvordan siger man Jeg er fra Danmark?
quiz.explanationDa: Eu sou da Dinamarca betyder jeg er fra Danmark.

quiz.questionDa: Hvilken frase bruger du for Hvad hedder du?
quiz.explanationDa: Como te chamas? betyder hvad hedder du?

quiz.questionDa: Hvilken frase betyder Jeg forstår ikke?
quiz.explanationDa: Não placeres før verbet og gør sætningen negativ.
A conta, por favor betyder regningen, tak.
